The '''Mission to Utapau''' occurred prior to the [[Battle of Utapau/Legends|Battle of Utapau]], following the [[Battle of Coruscant/Legends|Battle of Coruscant]].

[[Null-class Advanced Recon Commando|Null ARC troopers]] [[Kom'rk Skirata|Kom'rk]] and [[Jaing Skirata|Jaing]] searched [[Utapau/Legends|Utapau]] to track down the remaining leaders of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].

The [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] forces discovered [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]] and the [[Separatist Council/Legends|Separatist Council]], and immediately informed [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], who saw to it that [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] was dispatched to destroy Grievous.

==Appearances==
